THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, ALLEN T FONG, JUDY Y RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONROY, AMBER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTFF. ON 6/4/03 THROUGH JUDGMENT DATED 6/3/03 . $4,063.41 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $150.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,963.71, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, ALLEN T FONG, JUDY Y RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONROY, AMBER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1032 BALBOA ST. S. F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT CONROY, AMBER
